zh.lifeSummary: 當Alan Cathcart於1394年出生在蘇格蘭雷福福爾卡夫卡特時，他的父親Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,32歲，母親Janet Maxwell20歲。他於1440年與Janet Maxwell在蘇格蘭雷福福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1484年被列為warden of the west marches。他去世於1497年10月3日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾享年103歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alan Cathcart于1394年出生在苏格兰雷福福爾卡夫卡特时，他的父亲Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,32岁，母亲Janet Maxwell20岁。他于1440年与Janet Maxwell在苏格兰雷福福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1484年被列为warden of the west marches。他去世于1497年10月3日在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾享年103岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cathcart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

en.lifeSummary: When Alan Cathcart was born in 1394, in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, was 32 and his mother, Janet Maxwell, was 20. He married Janet Maxwell in 1440, in Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. In 1484, at the age of 90, his occupation is listed as warden of the west marches. He died on 3 October 1497, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 103, and was buried in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alan Cathcart est né en 1394, à Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Janet Maxwell, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Janet Maxwell en 1440, à Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. En 1484, à l’âge de 90 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est warden of the west marches. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1497, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 103 ans, et a été enterré à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alan Cathcart 1394 in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, 32 und seine Mutter Janet Maxwell 20. Er hat 1440 in Renfrewshire, Scotland Janet Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1484, als er 90 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als warden of the west marches aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. Oktober 1497 im Alter von 103 Jahren in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Ayr, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Cathcart è nato il nel 1394 nel Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Janet Maxwell, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Janet Maxwell nel 1440, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1484, all'età di 90 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come warden of the west marches. Morì il 3 ottobre 1497, nel Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 103 anni, e fu sepolto a Ayr, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alan Cathcartが1394年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアカスカートで生まれた時，父Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,は32歳，母Janet Maxwellは20歳であった。1440年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアでJanet Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1484年，90歳の時，職業はwarden of the west marchesと記録されている。彼は1497年10月3日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルで103歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alan Cathcart(이)가 1394년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 캐스카트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Maxwell(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1440년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 Janet Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1484년, 90세의 나이로 그의 직업은 warden of the west marches이었다. 그는 1497년 10월 3일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 103세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 에이르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alan Cathcart nasceu em 1394, em Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Janet Maxwell, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Janet Maxwell em 1440, em Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1484, com 90 anos, sua profissão aparece como warden of the west marches. Ele faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1497, em Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 103 anos, e foi sepultado em Ayr, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alan Cathcart родился в 1394 г. в местности каткарт, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Janet Maxwell, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Maxwell в 1440 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1484 году, в возрасте 90 лет,  он работал по профессии warden of the west marches. Он умер 3 октября 1497 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 103 лет и был похоронен в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alan Cathcart nació en 1394, en Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Janet Maxwell, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Janet Maxwell en 1440, en Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1484, a la edad de 90 años, su ocupación registrada era warden of the west marches. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1497, en Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 103 años, y fue sepultado en Ayr, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
